name: neon
description: Manage Neon Postgres projects, branches, and execute database queries

envVars.name: NEON_API_KEY
envVars.description: Neon API Key for Management API access

envVars.name: DATABASE_URL
envVars.description: PostgreSQL connection string for database queries

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List all Neon projects in your account

tools.name: List Branches
tools.description: List all branches for a specific project

tools.name: Query Database
tools.description: Execute SQL queries against the connected database

tools.name: List Tables
tools.description: List all tables in the connected database

tools.name: Describe Table
tools.description: Get detailed schema information for a specific table

prompts.title: Check database status
prompts.prompt: Show me the status of my Neon projects and their branches.

prompts.title: Explore database schema
prompts.prompt: List all tables in my database and show me the schema for the main tables.

prompts.title: Query database
prompts.prompt: Help me query my database to find specific data.
